_doc: Template for database_options.json — delete _doc keys before use.

global._doc: Cross-datasource settings. grouped_fields groups signals from different sources onto a single subplot.

my_datasource._doc_field_display: List of raw signal names to visualize (omit to show all columns).
my_datasource._doc_signals: Per-signal metadata. Only non-default values need to be specified. Keys: label, unit, unit_conversion, range, period_resampling, priority, color, visible, line_dash.
my_datasource._doc_numerics: Default numeric settings applied to all signals in this datasource unless overridden per-signal.
my_datasource._doc_grouped_fields: Local signal grouping within this datasource (signals plotted on the same subplot).
